titleStmt.title: SII 28.128: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 128. (A.R. No. 283 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records the royal approval of the gift of one vēli of land out his own kāṇi in Vallam in Veṇṇaiyūr-nāḍu in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu made by Arayaṉ Sōmaṉātha dēvaṉ alias Kurukulattaraiyaṉ for the supply of a garland of flowers for God Āḷuḍaiyār during the midnight service (arddhajāmakkālam). Out of this one vēli, 1/4 vēli was meant to be utilised for laying out a garden raising the said flowers and (3/4) for the allowance (koṟṟu) and clothes (puḍavai-mudal) of those tending the garden. The land was to be taken over by the body in charge of those supplying flowers to the temple (tiruppū-toṇḍargaḷukku-nāyakam). Ten members of this body are named and they were nominated to pay the tax (ūr-māvinda-kaḍamai) and kuḍimai in respect of the said land and utilise the balance (after paying iṟai) for arranging the supply of 130 cheṅgaḻunīr flowers daily for the above said service. Toṇḍaimāṉ was the one who interceded for getting the royal order which was taken down by Mīṉavaṉ Mūvendavēḷāṉ. The transaction was approved to be entered in the tirukkai-oṭṭi and to be inscribed in the tirumāḷigai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja tevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟu nāḷ nūṟṟu Orupattaiñcu § to
ṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum maturāntaka brahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku sāmutāyattirumā
ḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalappallavarayaṉum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum ko
yil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyattiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Āḷu
ṭaiyārkkut tiruvarddhacāmakkālattile ceṅkaḻunir tiruppaḷḷittāmattāṟ tiruttoṅkal ceytu cātta
cceṅkaḻunir Ākkavum Ākkuvāṟkku koṟṟukkum puṭavai mutalukkum nittaviṉota vaḷanāṭṭu Āvūr
kkūṟṟattuk kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ comaṉāta tevaṉāṉa kurukulattaraiyaṉ rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇai
yūr nāṭṭu vallattut taṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattu rājādhirājaṉ kamuku tirunantavaṉattukku nirpāykiṟa maṉṟeṟu kūttaṉ
vāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ tillaināyakaṉ nilattukkut teṟkkum meṟpaṭiyāṉ nilattukku meṟ
kum kārimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉuḷḷiṭṭār nilattukkum vāykkālukkum vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyiṉum naṭu
vupaṭṭa nilattu nirnilaiyāyt tirucceṅkaḻunirp payirc ceyya nilaṅkālum payiṟ ceyvārkku Ilakkaikkum
koṟṟukkum nilam mukkālum Āka veli nilaṅ kuṭuttāṉeṉṟum Innilam veliyum tiruppūt toṇ
ṭarkaḷukku nāyakam kuvaḷaippākkiḻāṉ niṉṟayaṅki Āṭuvāṉāṉa tillai Aḻakap piccaṉum tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉāṉa poṉṉampalap piccaṉum tirukkaḻippālaiyāṉ Ālāla cuntarappiccaṉum periyaṉāyaṉāṉa nālāyirappiccaṉu
m tirunaṭṭap perumāṉāṉa Ampalak kūttappiccaṉum pariyeṟu cevakaṉāṉa Eṭuttaruḷiya cipātappiccaṉum tirunaṭṭamāṭi Āṉa
tevarkaḷ tevappiccaṉum periyaṉāyaṉāṉa ceyya poṟpātap piccaṉum nāyakaṉāṉa karumulakāraṇap piccaṉum tiruc
ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tillaiṉāyakappiccaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār kaikkoṇṭu Innilattu Ūrmāvinta kaṭamai Iṟuttuk kuṭimaiyu
ñ ceytu Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟukku nūṟṟu muppatu tirucceṅkaḻunirt tiruppaḷḷittāmam nittaṟ paṭiyāka Eṇṇak kaṭa
varkaḷāka sātaṉam paṇṇit tantārkaḷ Eṉṟum Itu tirukkaioṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum Ittiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruttoṅkalākac ceytu
tiruvarddhacāmak kālattile cāttavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu toṇṭai
māṉ tāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭic ceyyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai
miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai toṇṭaimāṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai vayaṉā
ṭṭarayaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai cetikularāyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai cittirāyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai nantipaṉmaṉe ḻutte
ṉṟum prasādañceytaruḷiṉār ceyyumpaṭippaṭi §
Digital edition of SII 28.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
